title: Nuclear Bomb Bay
description: This mod adds a Nuclear Bomb Bay, which uses Alex's Caves Nuclear Bombs, to Immersive Aircraft's planes.
body:
Adds a Nuclear Bomb Bay to Immersive Aircraft's planes, uses Alex's Caves Nuclear Bombs.
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71ea57ab5cfe6274ef999d684a335368afed6a06.png)

**DISCLAIMER:**

Due to how the weapon placing system works in immersive aircraft, by default ships like the Warship can drop up to 6 nukes simultaneously, for this a datapack was created to balance the amount of bombs dropped by each plane.
[LINK](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nuke-bay-balance-pack)
